name: executive
description: 14 skills for mid-market executives running their company through Claude: board prep, investor comms, hiring loops, decision-quality checks, strategic resets, and the durable-capture rhythms that compound executive judgment over time. Model-agnostic. Portable across Claude Code, Claude.ai, Codex, Cursor, and any harness reading the SKILL.md spec.

credits.name: Matt Pocock
credits.contribution: Structural design of the handoff skill, MIT license credit preserved

credits.contribution: Inspiration for the hoard skill's durable-notebook pattern

credits.name: Ray Dalio
credits.contribution: Adapted compound-interest pattern for the principle-check skill
